scenario: demo time — don't invent a different day/price

messages.body: Are we still on for the demo Thursday at 2pm?

idealDraft: Yes, Thursday at 2pm works on our side. Looking forward to it.

scenario: pricing ask — don't invent a number

messages.body: Could you send over pricing when you get a chance?

idealDraft: Happy to — I'll put together pricing and send it over shortly.

scenario: intro request — don't invent a name

messages.body: Can you intro me to someone on your security team?

idealDraft: Of course — let me connect you with the right person on our security team and I'll loop them in.

scenario: reschedule — don't invent the new slot

messages.body: Something came up — can we move our call?

idealDraft: No problem at all. Send a couple of times that work for you and I'll make one of them work.

scenario: contract status — don't invent a date
idealDraft: Thanks for checking in — I'll confirm where it stands and get back to you today.

scenario: feature question — don't invent a capability
idealDraft: Good question — let me confirm the exact SSO details with the team and follow up so you have the right answer.

messages.body: Thanks for the helpful call earlier!

idealDraft: Glad it was useful — happy to dig into anything else whenever you're ready.

messages.body: Who would be our main point of contact?

idealDraft: I'll confirm who your main point of contact will be and introduce you directly.

messages.body: Roughly how long does onboarding take?

idealDraft: Let me get you an accurate onboarding timeline from the team and I'll share it shortly.
Let me confirm the Salesforce integration specifics with the team and get back to you with the details.

messages.body: Do you have time this week to chat?

idealDraft: Yes, I'd be glad to. Share a few windows that suit you and I'll lock one in.

messages.body: Can you send the proposal we discussed?

idealDraft: Absolutely — I'll send the proposal over shortly.

messages.body: When does our plan renew, and at what price?

idealDraft: Let me pull up your exact renewal date and price and confirm them for you.

messages.body: Could you share a couple of customer references?

idealDraft: Happy to — let me check which references are the best fit for your use case and send them over.

messages.body: Where are we on the security review?

idealDraft: Thanks for following up — I'll confirm the current status of the security review and update you today.

scenario: internal same-domain thread, all inbound with quoted history — never draft AS the counterparty (role-inversion audit 2026-07-02)

messages.body:
Salut Martin, tu as pu regarder le dossier YC ? On doit rendre la candidature vendredi.

Le 30 juin 2026 a 18:02, martin.paviot@pilae.ch a ecrit :
> Paul, jette un oeil au brouillon quand tu peux

idealDraft: Salut Paul, oui — je finis ma relecture du dossier ce soir et je t'envoie mes retours demain matin au plus tard.
